title: FemCraft Client
description: Utility & FPS Boost Client for FemBoys
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49f4729db1961b875d9a80d5c1a271c4b2e431d9_0.webp)

The **FemCraft Client** is a Fabric-based client modpack focused on performance, usability, and expressive visual customization. It combines massive performance optimizations with a clean integration of the [Essential mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) and a curated collection of high-quality utilities that players actually use in everyday gameplay.

Beyond performance, FemCraft introduces a wide range of visual upgrades: smooth animations, custom 3D models that bring previously flat elements to life, and a cohesive femboy & LGBTQ-themed aesthetic that gives the client a distinct identity. The interface is designed to be clear, modern, and highly customizable, making the overall experience more intuitive and thoughtfully structured than traditional competitors.

All-in-one, FemCraft aims to deliver a faster, cleaner, and more flexible Minecraft client without sacrificing style.

**IMPORTANT: ONLY RELEASE VERSIONS OF FEMCRAFT CONTAIN ALL FEATURES. BETA/ALPHA VERSIONS MISS ALL MODS THAT HAVE NOT YET UPDATED!**
